allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tokens=d.get\('tokens',{}\); print\('access_token found:', 'access_token' in tokens\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); tokens=d.get\('tokens',{}\); print\('token keys:', list\(tokens.keys\(\)\)\); at=tokens.get\('access_token',''\); print\('access_token prefix:', at[:40] if at else 'NOT FOUND'\)")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const d=JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/wence/.config/configstore/firebase-tools.json','utf8'\)\); const t=d.tokens||{}; console.log\('keys:', Object.keys\(t\)\); console.log\('access_token:', \(t.access_token||''\).substring\(0,40\)\)")
